description: Private account by Yeshuʿa b. Ismāʿīl al-Makhmūrī. Dating: ca. 1080. Concerning shipping goods from the Maghreb to Alexandria. Mentions different expenses in the ports and different goods: wool, scarlet material, perfumes, fabrics, and butter. Also mentions money exchange (with different types of dinars). (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #324) VMR
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
